Author: You
Name: Bisme
Punchline: In-game meld optimizer with BiS targets and overcap awareness.
Description: FFXIV in-game meld optimizer. Pick a job, load your equipped gear, click Auto-Optimize: the plugin picks the best food and places materia to match the BiS target while respecting per-piece stat caps. Patch 7.4 i790 BiS data embedded.
Changelog: 1.1.0: Full in-game ImGui UI. 21-job optimizer with food auto-pick, per-piece overcap, grade XII/XI pentameld pattern.
